article.body_preview:
RAJSHAHI, May 2, 2023 (BSS) - Dragon has brought diversifications in the fruit farming system as many people are seen cultivating the crop commercially in the region, including its vast Barind tract.

Farming of the high-value cash crop has opened up fortunes of many of the farmers as it's being judged as lucrative compared to other ones for the last couple of years.
